evidence: The Company s businesses increasingly leverage artificial intelligence solutions to optimize their operations, improve customer experiences, and enhance their products and services.
The Company's future growth rate depends upon its ability to identify and evolve with emerging technological trends including artificial intelligence machine learning and robotics.
The Company s businesses increasingly leverage artificial intelligence solutions to optimize their operations, improve customer experiences, and enhance their products and services.
The use of artificial intelligence in the development of the Company's products and services could also impact its intellectual property protections.

The Company s artificial intelligence efforts may subject it to heightened compliance and legal risks related to technology integration, accuracy, program bias, data sourcing, intellectual property infringement, data privacy, and cybersecurity.

New vulnerabilities may be introduced as cybersecurity threats continue to evolve and if the Company or its third-party vendors increase their use of generative artificial intelligence and machine learning.
The Company may experience brand or reputational harm if it fails to appropriately manage its use of artificial intelligence in compliance with applicable laws and regulations.

limitations: No quantified AI-attributable investment amounts, headcount, or program budgets disclosed in the excerpts; investment intensity scored 3 based on named but unquantified AI deployment.
AI narrative describes named use cases (operations optimization, customer experience, product development) but no deployment metrics or quantified outcomes are provided.

Risk disclosure is detailed and company-specific with named risk mechanisms (bias, IP infringement, regulatory compliance, cybersecurity, competitive disadvantage) but no quantification or named governance body, capping score at 4.
Excerpts are primarily from risk factors and item 8; no MD&A or capex discussion sections were included, limiting visibility into financial commitments.
